creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241456
py-dj41-django-redis-relax-contraints-and-switch-to-py-redis-v3.patch

At first glance it looks promising (= build/install/quick runtime test) to patch only www/py-dj41-django-redis (= relax contraints, switch back to py-redis), but I still need a little more time to do detailed tests.

Attached is the current patch, in case someone wants to take a look and test it in the meantime.
